channel.title: Sarah Medical Center
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Sarah Medical Center

item.title: Opening of the English Clinic for Pregnancy & Childbirth at Sarah Medical Center
item.description: In partnership with the English Hospital in Nazareth, the English Clinic has relocated to its new home at Sarah Medical Center in Umm al-Fahm — free services for all women.

item.title: Free medical services during Ramadan
item.description: Sarah Medical Center offers its services free of charge to all health fund members throughout the holy month of Ramadan.

item.title: Birthday wishes to Dr. Mohammad Kabaha
item.description: We congratulate Center Director Dr. Mohammad Kabaha on his 44th birthday, thanking him for his dedication and service.
